## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SmithAI and GrowthX to discuss ongoing website refresh project and team changes.](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Elvis is leaving GrowthX; Megan will continue leading the Smith account with additional support coming soon](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
  - [Website refresh project progressing well: 12 industry pages published, 22 ready to publish this week](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Partner pages need significant improvement; prioritizing updates to these pages before city pages](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [TikTok ads performing exceptionally well with low CPL ($65) and quick conversions](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)

## Topics

### Team Changes at GrowthX

  - [Elvis announced his last week with GrowthX, moving to focus on side clients](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
  - [Megan will continue leading the Smith account](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [New support person to join in a couple of weeks](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Website Refresh Project Progress

  - [12 industry pages published](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [22 pages edited and ready to publish this week](https://fathom.video/share/MSLsxXUiyHz-zYR_MearN9R_bxN6rAR4?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
